case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. THOMAS, HORACE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, HORACE $1,566.38 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,640.38

PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 9/24/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $60.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,574.16 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
